jobStep.title: Add job
jobStep.description: Add the job posting by link or by pasting the text.

success.title: Job captured
success.description: The job posting was saved successfully.

urlFallback.title: We could not read this job posting automatically.
urlFallback.descriptionTextTab: Some job portals block extraction. Please copy the text of the posting and paste it in the “Paste text” tab.

urlForm.urlHelp: Supports LinkedIn, Indeed, and other job portals.

manualForm.fullTextHelp: Copy the full text of the job posting and paste it here.
manualForm.fullTextPlaceholder: Paste the full text of the job posting here...

kurz.label: Compact (~250 words)
kurz.hint: Straight to the point — ideal when the job posting lists only a few requirements.

standard.label: Standard (~350 words)
standard.hint: The classic length for one page.

options.generateCoverLetterHelp: Creates a cover letter tailored to the job.

progress.doNotClose: Please do not close this window.
progress.footnote: Completed steps are marked as done automatically after completion.

usage.exhausted: Daily limit reached ({used}/{limit}). Please come back in 24 hours.

toasts.existingApplication: An application already exists for this job. We’ll open it for you.

progress.title: Creating application...
progress.overdue: Taking longer than usual, just a moment …
progress.estimate: This usually takes {seconds} seconds. Please do not close this window.
progress.creating: Your application is being created with AI...

options.title: Options
options.languageHelp: Detected automatically. You can adjust it here.

templates.title: Choose design
templates.description: Choose a template for your résumé.
templates.coverLetterNote: The cover letter is automatically created in the matching design.

jobPostingForm.title: Create job posting manually
jobPostingForm.description: Fill in all relevant fields to create a new job posting

placeholders.title: e.g. Marketing Manager, Nurse, Sales Representative
placeholders.description: Describe the role, the team, and what makes the company special...

help.description: General description of the role and the company

input.title: Add by link
input.description: Add a job posting by link and have it analyzed automatically
input.urlHelp: LinkedIn, Indeed, and other job portals are supported

urlFallback.title: We could not read this job posting automatically.
urlFallback.descriptionManualTab: Some job portals block extraction. Please switch to the “Manual” tab and copy the text of the posting there.

help.title: Supported platforms
help.description: You can import job postings from LinkedIn, Indeed, and other job portals. If analysis fails, you can also enter the information manually.
